notes: Memory-only Lite Demo package with one public skill.
v0.2.6 gives each durable memory one body owner and a compact wake-up route instead of copying the same narrative across memory layers.
Touched scopes load every matching owner and mandatory guard; selected relevant memory is not cut by a top-k or total token quota.
Recent session-log lines are only a recency probe. Misses, ambiguity, conflicts, first touch, and irreversible actions widen retrieval.
New session logs admit unresolved items, rollbacks, pending review memories, and sparse checkpoints instead of routine green narration.
On first activation in an old unmarked project, v0.2.6 reorganizes project memory once without resuming the old task or touching business files.
Legacy session-log bytes remain an immutable prefix, and later activations are idempotent.
Installation does not scan all projects; takeover happens only when the user activates Lite Demo in the current old project.
v0.2.4 task-routing wording and one-skill ordinary-user behavior remain unchanged.
v0.1.7 remains available as the retained stable fallback.
